channel.title: jpcite public discovery feed
channel.description: Public pages and API documents for jpcite, a source-linked evidence API for Japanese public programs, laws, cases, and company research.
channel.copyright: (C) 2026 Bookyou株式会社. Public-source records keep their original source licenses and attribution.

item.title: LLM crawler discovery surfaces
item.description: Canonical llms.txt, llms-full, robots, sitemap, OpenAPI, MCP, and well-known discovery links for jpcite crawlers and managed agents.

item.title: jpcite API docs
item.description: Overview, quickstart, MCP setup, and REST API guidance.

item.title: Agent-safe OpenAPI document
item.description: Machine-readable API document for evidence, search, and public-record lookup endpoints.

item.title: MCP tools guide
item.description: Install and configuration notes for using jpcite through MCP clients.

item.title: Evidence prefetch guide
item.description: Explains source URLs, fetched-at metadata, known gaps, and citation-preserving answers.

item.title: Data sources and licenses
item.description: Lists public source families and attribution notes for records served by jpcite.

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Metered API pricing, cost preview guidance, and anonymous usage notes.
